authoritative_preregistration_time_sourc: git commit author and committer timestamp
correction: The manifest field was a clerical future timestamp. The immutable Git commit and tag prove that the complete candidate, horizon, cost and decision freeze existed at 14:25:29 UTC, before any information-review outcome.
CONTRE: The incorrect field is retained forever in the original WORM; audit consumers must use the commit timestamp and this annotation rather than silently trusting that field.
